announcements.name: Thanks for staying on Caelus!
announcements.description: As of today, Caelus is at 4K on-site players! Well, we're so close to getting to 5K, which I never thought we're even gonna get to 1K at some point. Thank you @nzjhsiaahajajakwoausuisisishdh for all the support you've been giving us lately. Without you Caelus wouldn't be at such a high number and without your constant help we wouldn't even get emotes on the platform, same with all the ugc's you keep providing for the on site's Catalog. And thank you @boma for the help you provide when I myself couldn't. And to everybody, thanks for staying on caelus as a good community <3
